'''Calo Nord's battle armor''' was a customized battle armor based on modified [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] design. It provided basic protection against ballistic and melee attack, and also offered resistance against cold, fire and sonic attacks. Originally worn by [[Calo Nord]], the battle armor was appropriated by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and his companions after they killed Nord. The armor was the only one of its kind, because [[Unidentified armorer (Calo Nord)|the designer]] was killed in order to ensure that the battle armor would be unique.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
